story.text:
# ✨ Name a Coordinate
**📐 → 🔢(coordinate) → 🏷️(name)**
*luca · substrate · V0*

Name a position in the cross-frame substrate. The geometry-Mage's first work is to give the floor a coordinate so other Mages can stand on it.

> A coordinate without a name is a position. A name without a coordinate is a story. Together they are a place.

*Keywords:* name · coordinate · substrate · v0 · geometry · uor
